title: The Train Station Mystery
content: While waiting for his train, Ethan noticed an old suitcase sitting alone on a bench. Many passengers walked past it, but no one claimed it. The station staff carefully checked the area and made an announcement over the speakers. A few minutes later, an elderly traveler hurried back. He had accidentally boarded the wrong platform and forgotten his suitcase while checking the schedule. Everyone smiled with relief. What first seemed like a mystery turned out to be a simple mistake during a busy morning at the station.
